prompt_template.system: You are a financial sentiment classifier. Return ONLY a JSON object with exactly one key: "sentiment". The value must be one of: "negative", "neutral", "positive". Classify the sentiment toward the specified target entity. Do not include any extra text.

components.name: format_reward
components.description: Valid JSON, exactly one key 'sentiment', and allowed value.

components.name: correctness_reward
components.description: Predicted sentiment matches ground-truth label exactly.
